title: PackageCloud tokens should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: PackageCloud API token detected in source code. PackageCloud tokens provide programmatic access to package repositories, allowing read/write operations on packages. Exposing these tokens enables unauthorized access to upload, delete, or download packages from your repository. Revoke this token immediately and store tokens securely in environment variables or secret management systems.
